task:
FreeCAD is open with /home/user/Documents/ball.FCStd, which contains a single Part::Sphere named 'Sphere' (Radius=30).

Export the 'Sphere' object as an 'STL Mesh (*.stl)' file to exactly /home/user/exports/ball.stl (creating /home/user/exports/ if it does not exist). The exported STL must contain at least 200 triangles — FreeCAD's default mesh deviation easily produces well over that for a 30 mm sphere, so default mesh settings are fine. After exporting, save the FCStd document.
